no_changes_rationale:
status: needs_investigation
reason: The requested server-spawn migration is blocked by missing prerequisite work in this branch. `cli/internal/server/workers.go:348-446` still starts execute-loop workers in-process and persists the server-local `ExecuteLoopWorkerSpec`; `cli/internal/server/workers.go:735-969` still builds `config.CLIOverrides` and `agent.ExecuteBeadLoopRuntime` manually and runs `agent.ExecuteBeadWorker` inline. The REST and GraphQL dispatch paths also still construct that same local spec at `cli/internal/server/server.go:2391-2456` and `cli/internal/server/graphql_adapters.go:63-149`. There is no `executeloop.ExecuteLoopSpec` type or unified ApplyDefaults -> Validate -> StartExecuteLoop lifecycle anywhere in this branch, so I cannot safely wire a server-spawned `ddx work` path while proving that MaxCostUSD, RequestTimeout, MinPower, MaxPower, OpaquePassthrough, and FromRev survive end-to-end.
